attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.DELIVERY_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.NAME, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.PLANNED_FLAG, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.STATUS_CODE, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.ASN_DATE_SENT, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.ASN_STATUS_CODE, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.GES_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.GLOBAL_NAME, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.DELIVERED_DATE, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.CONFIRM_DATE, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.INITIAL_PICKUP_DATE, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.ULTIMATE_DROPOFF_DATE, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES,
 (
 select DELIVERY_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES
 minus
 select DELIVERY_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.DELIVERY_ID = STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.DELIVERY_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES.REFRESH_DATETIME
